name: Ben Carson
subject: I'm running for President
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27533855:26486850604:m:1:876315805:98319BE5960E25CDC31B196033354385:r)
---
|

Peter, good morning from my hometown of Detroit, Michigan.

In a few hours, I will be making an official announcement - but I want to tell you first.

**I am running for President of the United States, and[I ask for your support](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27533855:26486850604:m:1:876315805:98319BE5960E25CDC31B196033354385:r).**

If this great nation is to survive the challenges of the modern world, we need to heal, we need to be inspired, and we need to revive the exceptional spirit that built America.

**Working with you and all of our fellow citizens, I want to lead that revival.**

I am not a politician, nor am I politically correct.

But I believe my values, my life experience, and my willingness to speak the truth and seek solutions prepares me well to lead our nation toward more prosperity, security, and freedom for every American.

Over the course of this campaign, both my team and I will ask for your support.

**But no day will be more special, or more historic than today - Day One.

[ So I ask for your commitment, right now, to this campaign. On Day One, I ask you to be among the first to make a contribution to Carson America, and I will be forever grateful](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27533855:26486850604:m:1:876315805:98319BE5960E25CDC31B196033354385:r)**.

| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27533855:26486850604:m:1:876315805:98319BE5960E25CDC31B196033354385:r)
---

Never before have we been so closely connected to each other, but more divided as a country.

Our political class has failed us, and as a nation we must work to reestablish what Abraham Lincoln once called a government of, by and for the people.

**While I know it will not be easy, I truly look forward to the journey ahead, and[I hope you will join me](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27533855:26486850604:m:1:876315805:98319BE5960E25CDC31B196033354385:r).**

Thank you, and God Bless America.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27533855:26486850604:m:1:876315805:98319BE5960E25CDC31B196033354385:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27533856:26486850604:m:1:876315805:98319BE5960E25CDC31B196033354385:r)
---
|

name: Ben Carson
subject: I'm running for President
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27547960:26495917251:m:1:876315805:858B77545AF43E988C6F3715EF7D1C1C:r)
---
|

Peter,

**I am running for President of the United States, and[I ask for your support](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27547960:26495917251:m:1:876315805:858B77545AF43E988C6F3715EF7D1C1C:r).**

If this great nation is to survive the challenges of the modern world, we need to heal, we need to be inspired, and we need to revive the exceptional spirit that built America.

**Working with you and all of our fellow citizens, I want to lead that revival.**

I am not a politician, nor am I politically correct.

But I believe my values, my life experience, and my willingness to speak the truth and seek solutions prepares me well to lead our nation toward more prosperity, security, and freedom for every American.

Over the course of this campaign, both my team and I will ask for your support.

**But no day will be more special, or more historic than today - Day One.

[ So I ask for your commitment, right now, to this campaign. On Day One, I ask you to be among the first to make a contribution to Carson America, and I will be forever grateful](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27547960:26495917251:m:1:876315805:858B77545AF43E988C6F3715EF7D1C1C:r)**.

| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27547960:26495917251:m:1:876315805:858B77545AF43E988C6F3715EF7D1C1C:r)
---

Never before have we been so closely connected to each other, but more divided as a country.

Our political class has failed us, and as a nation we must work to reestablish what Abraham Lincoln once called a government of, by and for the people.

**While I know it will not be easy, I truly look forward to the journey ahead, and[I hope you will join me](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27547960:26495917251:m:1:876315805:858B77545AF43E988C6F3715EF7D1C1C:r).**

Thank you, and God Bless America.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: Rick
subject: Message from Gov. Walker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[****](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI1ODYzMzAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYwMzMwNjg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
****
****
****We wanted to make sure that you didn 't miss this message from Governor Walker, Peter.

Our records still indicate that you have not yet become a Charter Member:
Email Address: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**

Record Number: **5806732**

Membership Status: **PENDING**
---
Will you join us in our fight to return power to the American taxpayer? Become a member:
[RED MEMBERSHIP
>>>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI1ODYzMzAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYwMzMwNjg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)| [WHITE MEMBERSHIP
>>>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI1ODYzMzAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYwMzMwNjg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)| [BLUE MEMBERSHIP
>>>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI1ODYzMzAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYwMzMwNjg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---|---|---

Thanks,

Rick Wiley
Our American Revival

**\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---**

**From:** Scott Walker
**Subject: This can 't be correct**
**Date:** April 25, 2015
******
**
****

Peter,

I just heard from our finance staff that you have not yet become a Charter Member. I understand that times are tough and plenty of campaigns and organizations are asking for your help, but we would really appreciate you joining our team as a Charter Member. [Please consider becoming a Charter Member now. ](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI1ODYzMzAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYwMzMwNjg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Our American Revival is a movement. We believe that the best government is one closest to the people. We believe that it is the American taxpayer that holds the power, not government bureaucrats. We are fighting for big, bold reforms, like the ones I instituted in Wisconsin. We can bring true change to Washington, but we need your help. [Please become a Charter Member today.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI1ODYzMzAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYwMzMwNjg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you for your consideration,

Governor Scott Walker

[

](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI1ODYzMzAS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTYwMzMwNjg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Paid for by Our American Revival

name: Jeb Bush Jr.
subject: Committed to stopping Hillary?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend,

It's been three weeks since Hillary Clinton announced she's running for President of the United States, and since then she has traveled the country talking to supporters and raising millions.

**She 's building momentum, winning over donors, and worst of all, voters.**

That's why I need you to step up in a big way, I need you to pledge to defeat Hillary right now by adding your name: [**RighttoRisePAC.org/Stop-Hillary/**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2898:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Every day you stay out of the fight, Hillary extends her lead and gets one more step closer to winning the White House.

**[It doesn't have to be that way, we can fight back but you need to get into the ring, to join this fight, and to commit you will do whatever it takes to stop her. And we need you to join the fight today.](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2899:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)**

Thank you for your time, and I look forward to counting you amongst our ranks.

Jeb Jr.

P.S. For every day you don't step up, Hillary extends her lead, so help us stop her now: [**RighttoRisePAC.org/Stop-Hillary/**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2900:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=2901:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=340&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)

body:
| We got big news today -- The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee endorsed Patrick!Friend -- We got big news today: The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee endorsed Patrick! Here's what the DSCC Chairman, Senator Jon Tester, had to say:
> _"**Patrick Murphy is one of our party 's most promising rising stars**, and his track record of fighting for Florida's working families, seniors, and the environment make him the strongest candidate to win the Florida Senate race and flip this seat."_
This is a big moment for our campaign. The official party committee that helps elect Democrats to the Senate is standing with Patrick! They believe he can win this Senate race. Now let's keep up our momentum with 50 online donations by midnight. Are you in? _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. name: Robby Mook, Hillary for America
subject: PHOTOS: Organizing parties
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Take a look at what we're building: | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI1ODg5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwMzU3NzQwS0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

This past weekend, a few folks got together in Syracuse, NY to talk organizing, Hillary, and what they could do in their community. And by a few, I mean... [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI1ODg5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwMzU3NzQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Meanwhile, supporters packed the room at a grassroots meeting in Atlanta, GA.

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI1ODg5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwMzU3NzQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

There were other energized meetings like this in Idaho and Vermont -- and even more happening every day this week.

People are excited about this thing we're building here, and they're not waiting to start organizing. I can't wait to see more photos like this and hear more stories as we launch this campaign all across the country -- but we need big resources to make that happen.

**Can you chip in $5 or more right now to help build our ground game?**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI1ODg5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwMzU3NzQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you, really.

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI1ODg5NjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwMzU3NzQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---

clean_body: Take a look at what we're building: | Friend -- This past weekend, a few folks got together in Syracuse, NY to talk organizing, Hillary, and what they could do in their community. And by a few, I mean... Meanwhile, supporters packed the room at a grassroots meeting in Atlanta, GA. There were other energized meetings like this in Idaho and Vermont -- and even more happening every day this week. People are excited about this thing we're building here, and they're not waiting to start organizing. I can't wait to see more photos like this and hear more stories as we launch this campaign all across the country -- but we need big resources to make that happen. Can you chip in $5 or more right now to help build our ground game? Thank you, really. Robby Robby Mook Campaign Manager Hillary for America | | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
